since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.73%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.41% · Gold +1.45% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.73%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.73%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: POWL is the standout at +7.76%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +7.76%, SKHY +6.47%, MU +6.15%, MRVL +5.83%, INTC +5.30%. Laggards: WDAY -4.42%, INTU -4.32%, ADBE -3.68%, CRM -2.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.12% at $121.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
